task.title: Temporarily setting the current qdisc of a network interface using the tc utility

context.p: Changing the current qdisc can optimize how the kernel handles packets as they pass through a network interface. For testing and benchmarking purposes, you can change the qdisc temporarily.

info.codeblock: # tc qdisc replace dev enp0s1 root htb

li.codeblock:
# tc -s qdisc show dev enp0s1
qdisc htb 8001: root refcnt 2 r2q 10 default 0 direct_packets_stat 0 direct_qlen 1000 Sent 0 bytes 0 pkt (dropped 0, overlimits 0 requeues 0) backlog 0b 0p requeues 0
